title: cytisus albus subsp. microphyllus
intro: Cytisus albus subsp. microphyllus, also known as the dwarf broom or small-leaved broom, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cytisus albus subsp. microphyllus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
